news.headline: Energy Abundance plans Data City, Texas - 5GW hub on 50,000 acres near Laredo, powered by 100% 24/7 green energy.
news.summary: In Houston on March 20, 2025, Energy Abundance Development Corporation announced their proposal for Data City, Texas. The project entails constructing a behind-the-meter data center hub with a capacity of 5 gigawatts on a sprawling land spanning 50,000 acres close to Laredo. This center will run entirely on 100% continuous green energy. This initiative aims to cater to the increasing needs of hyperscalers who are encountering growing challenges in this arena.

news.headline: Rittal partners with JAGGAER to streamline procurement processes, improve compliance, and boost transparency. Headquarters in Herborn, Hesse.
news.summary: Rittal, a prominent global provider of electrical enclosures, power distribution, climate control, IT infrastructure, software, and services, has announced its partnership with procurement solutions provider JAGGAER in Research Triangle, N.C. JAGGAER's platform will enhance Rittal's procurement operations ranging from sourcing and contract management to order processing, supplier relationships, and complaint resolution. Headquartered in Herborn, Hesse, Rittal has selected JAGGAER to optimize its procurement processes for improved efficiency.

news.headline: ResultsCX buys Aucera, boosting its US expansion and service offerings in key sectors. #acquisition #CXM #Fortune100.
news.summary: ResultsCX, a prominent provider of Customer Experience Management (CXM) services, has recently acquired Aucera, previously recognized as DialAmerica. Aucera, being one of the largest privately owned Customer Experience Management firms in the U.S., brings significant value to ResultsCX. The acquisition enhances ResultsCX's foothold in the U.S. market and bolsters its service offerings in key sectors like Healthcare, BFSI, and Utilities. ResultsCX serves leading global companies, including multiple Fortune 100 and FTSE 250 enterprises. This strategic move aims to leverage Aucera's expertise in CXM to further expand ResultsCX's capabilities and market reach.

news.headline: Inventors from Kansas City, Kan. create new outdoor adult party game "DIAMOND DARTS" for gatherings.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 20, 2025, two inventors, hailing from Kansas City, Kan., introduced DIAMOND DARTS, a new target game designed for enjoyment at parties, picnics, and gatherings. Their creation offers a fresh and engaging alternative to traditional game options.

news.headline: Methode Electronics' Grakon unit honored by PACCAR as top supplier for advanced lighting systems.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Methode Electronics, Inc. revealed that its Grakon business division, a prominent player in innovative lighting systems, was acknowledged by PACCAR, renowned for producing Kenworth and Peterbilt trucks, as a premier supplier. PACCAR's recognition highlights the excellence of Grakon's performance in the industry.

news.headline: Dow climbs over 100 points; Accenture shares drop 7% after Q2 earnings; S&P 500 rises 0.28% to  5,689.83.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. saw a positive start today as the Dow Jones index surged by over 100 points on Thursday. As of the market opening, the Dow was up by 0.25% reaching 42,070.99, while the NASDAQ climbed 0.37% to 17,817.11. The S&P 500 also experienced a rise, gaining 0.28% to 5,689.83. In terms of sectors, consumer discretionary shares witnessed a 0.7% increase, while materials shares fell by 0.3% during trading on Thursday.One of the top news items for the day was the drop in share prices of Accenture Plc (NYSE:ACN) by more than 7% after it announced its second-quarter results. The company disclosed earnings of $2.82 per share for Q2 2025, slightly exceeding the predicted $2.81, with sales amounting to $16.66 billion, nearly aligning with the expected $16.62 billion and the company’s guidance of $16.2 billion–$16.8 billion. Accenture also revised its fiscal year 2025 revenue growth outlook to 5%-7% in local currency. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: EIA Natural Gas Change BCF Actual 9B (Forecast 5B, Previous -62B)
AeroShield produces first full-size aerogels for entry doors, a pivotal milestone for energy-efficient window production.
news.summary: In WALTHAM, Massachusetts, AeroShield Materials, a company stemming from MIT, has achieved a significant milestone in enhancing energy-efficient products for buildings. Their latest development involves the creation of transparent, highly-insulating aerogel glass for full-size entry doors. This innovation is pioneering as it is the first of its kind to be produced on a large scale. By introducing these energy-saving windows, AeroShield Materials aims to revolutionize residential construction practices.

news.headline: Repole, a billionaire, finances NYC basketball return at St. John's University.
news.summary: Yesterday, it was reported that the global economy expanded by 5.6% in the last quarter, marking the fastest growth rate since 1968. The United States experienced a 6.9% increase in its GDP during the same period, surpassing market expectations. In contrast, China saw a growth of 4.9%, slightly below predictions. These numbers indicate a strong recovery for many economies worldwide, driven by a combination of factors such as increased consumer spending, government stimulus measures, and easing COVID-19 restrictions.Experts project that this positive trend is likely to continue in the coming months as countries strive to bounce back from the pandemic-induced downturn.

news.headline: MoneyGram wins 2025 USA TODAY Top Workplaces USA Award for fourth year in a row. Employee-driven recognition.
news.summary: For four years in a row, MoneyGram has been acknowledged by Top Workplaces, solely based on feedback from employees. The company's culture is centered around its mission, vision, and values, which are embraced by employees daily to improve customer lives. This recognition reflects MoneyGram's commitment to maintain a positive work environment.

news.headline: Zoomd will announce Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 26, 2025, at 11 a.m. ET. $ZOMD, $ZMDTF symbols.
news.summary: A conference call is scheduled to take place at 11 a.m. ET on March 26, 2025, in Toronto. This involves Zoomd Technologies Ltd. (TSXV: ZOMD) and its subsidiary Zoomd Ltd. (OTC: ZMDTF). The companies, collectively known as Zoomd, are in the marketing technology (MarTech) sector.

news.headline: Jo Hastings, former bank executive, joins CounterpointeSRE as managing director to lead C-PACE transactions.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, Counterpointe Sustainable Real Estate has named Jo Hastings as the new managing director overseeing C-PACE transactions. With a background as a bank executive, Hastings brings over a decade of experience, including a role as U.S. Head of Large Loan Originations & Balance Sheet Finance at Société Générale. Prior to that, she held positions at Eurohypo and HSBC Bank as a relationship manager. Her appointment signifies a strategic move for CounterpointeSRE to expand their sustainable real estate financing initiatives under her leadership.

news.headline: Earnings recovery stumbles after soaring high - Source: Bloomberg.
TWOPAGES Curtains reaches 10-year milestone in March 2025 as a top provider of custom window treatments.
news.summary: In March 2025, TWOPAGES Curtains, a company based in Spokane, Washington, celebrates its tenth year in business. Specializing in top-notch custom window treatments, the company emphasizes its dedication to enhancing living spaces with high-quality, chic designs. They aim to offer customers a seamless experience by delivering superior custom window treatments.

news.headline: World Market chooses Ovative Group as new Digital Marketing and Measurement Agency. #MINNEAPOLIS #PRNewswire
news.summary: In Minneapolis on March 19, 2025, World Market, a leading specialty retailer for home products, announced the selection of Ovative Group as their new Digital Marketing and Measurement Agency. Ovative, known for its expertise in media, measurement, and creative services, will now manage World Market's paid search efforts, with plans for expansion into other digital marketing initiatives. This partnership signifies an important move for both companies as they aim to enhance their online presence and drive increased engagement with consumers.

news.headline: Cargill and Global Water Challenge help 150,000 people in water-stressed regions with safe drinking water. Strategic partnership proven successful.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Cargill and Global Water Challenge revealed that their partnership, Cargill Currents, has successfully enhanced access to safe drinking water for over 150,000 individuals across five continents. This milestone showcases the efficacy of collaborative efforts in tackling water-related challenges in regions facing scarcity. Cargill Currents, a collaborative project between Global Water Challenge and Cargill, exemplifies the impact of strategic partnerships in addressing crucial global issues related to water.

news.headline: ImmunoGenesis to present at 2025 NeauxCancer Oncology Conference, showcasing innovative cancer therapies.
news.summary: The Innovation Track at a recent conference in Houston on March 20, 2025, highlighted promising biotech and healthcare companies making strides in the oncology field. Among them, ImmunoGenesis, a clinical-stage biotech firm specializing in cutting-edge immunotherapies, revealed its latest developments.

news.headline: Mattamy Homes buys 30 lots in Rocking K, Arizona. Largest NA homebuilder acquires 4.1 acres in Vail, AZ. Deal worth...
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Tucson, Arizona, Mattamy Homes, the biggest privately-owned homebuilder in North America, revealed the purchase of 4.1 acres of valuable land in the established Rocking K master-planned community in Vail, AZ. The acquisition, valued at an undisclosed amount, signifies a strategic move for the company in expanding its presence in the region.

news.headline: Reliance Matrix introduces Actual Return to Work tech to streamline return-to-work process for employees, supervisors, and HR.
news.summary: A new technology called Actual Return to Work has been introduced by Reliance Matrix in Philadelphia. This innovation aims to simplify the return-to-work process for employees, supervisors, and HR partners.

news.headline: Mintify introduces MintAI, AI-powered trading feature for traders, offering automation, discovery, and analytics.
news.summary: A company based in New York, Mintify, has recently introduced MintAI, an innovative AI-powered trading tool aimed at providing traders with automation, exploration, and enhanced data analysis capabilities. This feature is designed to empower traders by leveraging artificial intelligence technology.

news.headline: Q2 Holdings received 2025 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award for exceptional culture, based on employee feedback survey.
news.summary: Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:QTWO), a prominent digital transformation solutions provider for financial services based in Austin, Texas, revealed that it has been presented with the prestigious 2025 USA TODAY Top Workplaces accolade. This award, aimed at organizations boasting 150 or more employees, commends those that have established outstanding cultures prioritizing their workforce. Recipients are selected through a survey orchestrated by Energage, assessing genuine input from employees. The award criteria are rooted in employee reactions to various statements.

news.headline: Ncontracts named a USA TODAY 2025 Top Workplace for the third year in a row. Previous awards include Top Workplace by The Tennessean for a fourth consecutive year.
news.summary: Ncontracts, a prominent provider of integrated compliance, risk, and third-party management solutions for the financial services sector based in Brentwood, Tennessee, has been honored as a USA TODAY 2025 Top Workplace for the third consecutive year. The company has consistently received accolades from Top Workplaces since 2021, earning various Industry and Culture Excellence awards. Additionally, Ncontracts was recognized as a Top Workplace by The Tennessean for the fourth year in a row. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to fostering a positive work environment and maintaining high standards of excellence.

news.headline: Valo Health appoints Peggy Dalicandro as VP, Head of HR to lead human capital strategy and talent acquisition.
news.summary: In Lexington, Massachusetts, Valo Health, Inc. unveiled the addition of Peggy Dalicandro as their Vice President, Head of Human Resources. Valo, a biotech firm emphasizing revolutionizing drug discovery through human-centered data and AI, aims to benefit from Dalicandro's expertise. She will spearhead Valo's human capital plan, oversee recruitment processes, and facilitate the company's growth. Dalicandro's appointment signifies Valo's commitment to fostering collaboration and enhancing its workforce.

news.headline: OIP Insurtech joins Insurity as System Integrator Partner to enhance insurance tech implementations, supporting R&D and professional services.
news.summary: Insurity, a prominent cloud-based software provider for the insurance industry, revealed in a recent announcement that OIP Insurtech has joined them as a System Integrator (SI) partner. This collaboration aims to enhance Insurity's ability to deliver smooth implementations and enhanced support for Property and Casualty (P&C) insurers. OIP Insurtech, a reliable and leading partner, has actively contributed to Insurity's ecosystem by supporting research and development, as well as professional services for insurance carriers, brokers, and MGAs. This collaboration marks a significant step forward in strengthening Insurity's offerings to the insurance sector.

news.headline: RSG appoints Charlie Phippen as CEO, utilizing his 20+ years' experience to enhance innovation and analytics.
news.summary: In White River Junction, Vermont, RSG has named Charlie Phippen as its CEO. With over two decades of experience in data-driven leadership, Phippen is poised to spearhead innovation and enhance analytical capacities within the company.

news.headline: Zelenskiy: Ukraine-US teams to meet in Saudi Arabia on Monday, it would be separate meeting from Russia-US teams.
Crypto Fear and greed Index 49/100 = Neutral
Inventor from Houston creates Mulcher Plus attachment for lawn mowers to mulch clippings, leaves without raking.
news.summary: In March 20, 2025, a resident from Houston, Texas created the MULCHER PLUS attachment to simplify mulching grass clippings and leaves with a non-mulching lawn mower. The inventor aimed to reduce manual raking by devising this new product. The innovation intends to streamline the mulching process, making it more efficient for users.

news.headline: U.S. stock indexes overcome early losses, bounce back and trend higher - stay updated.
Inventor creates The Flex Bottle to store workout mixes and pills in one container, designed for convenient gym use.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 20, 2025, an inventor from Valrico, Florida shared their inspiration for creating THE FLEX BOTTLE. The inventor aimed to provide a convenient solution for storing, carrying, and accessing pre/post-workout mixes and pills at the gym or while working out. The innovative bottle design was crafted with this purpose in mind, offering ease of use and portability for fitness enthusiasts.

news.headline: Copia Wealth Studios introduces "Copia - Clarity," AI-powered platform for sophisticated investors in diverse portfolios.
news.summary: A cutting-edge wealth management platform named "Copia - Clarity" has been unveiled by Copia Wealth Studios in San Diego on March 20, 2025. This innovative platform is tailored for skilled allocators overseeing various investment portfolios. The launch aims to cater to the increasing demand for advanced solutions in wealth management.

news.headline: FNB's subsidiary, First National Bank, awarded Top Workplace USA for fifth consecutive time, positive feedback on culture.
news.summary: A company's exceptional leadership and employee-centric culture were recognized with a prestigious national award. On March 20, 2025, F.N.B. Corporation (NYSE: FNB) revealed that its primary subsidiary, First National Bank, has earned the distinction of being named a Top Workplace USA for the fifth time. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to its workforce and signifies its continuous efforts to maintain a positive and engaging work environment.

news.headline: Menarini Group partners with VisualDx to improve identification of BPDCN, a rare malignant disease. VisualDx is used by 2,300+ facilities worldwide.
news.summary: BPDCN, a highly aggressive blood cancer, has a dismal prognosis. VisualDx, a clinical decision support system, is utilized by over 2,300 healthcare facilities, including hospitals, clinics, and medical schools globally. The system aims to improve the recognition of individuals potentially suffering from BPDCN.

news.headline: H World Group (NASDAQ: HTHT) beats Q4 revenue with $825M sales, projects 6% growth for 2025, 9.2% growth in Legacy-Huazhu segment.
news.summary: H World Group Limited (NASDAQ: HTHT) saw its shares rise in trading following the release of its fourth-quarter results. The company reported adjusted earnings per ADS of 14 cents, falling short of analyst expectations of 27 cents. However, quarterly sales were impressive at $825 million, surpassing the street's estimate of $798.17 million. Revenue experienced a 7.8% year-over-year increase, exceeding the previously projected growth range of 1% to 5% for the fourth quarter of 2024. Within the Legacy-Huazhu segment, revenue grew by 9.2% compared to the same period last year, in line with the predicted 1% to 5% growth. Revenue in the Legacy-DH segment also saw a 2.9% year-over-year uptick. By December 31, the company had 11,147 hotels and over one million hotel rooms in operation. Revenue from leased and owned hotels in the quarter amounted to $462 million, a 2.3% decrease year-over-year and an 8.6% drop quarter-over-quarter. On the other hand, revenue from franchised hotels in the same period reached $342 million, reflecting a substantial 24% year-over-year growth. Hotel turnover increased by 16.5% year-over-year in the fourth quarter.

news.headline: Period panties market size to rise from $156.27 million in 2024 to $577.89 million by 2033, with a CAGR of 15.64%. Growing adoption due to sustainability and comfort benefits, driven by increasing awareness of menstrual health and initiatives combating period poverty through reusable products.
news.summary: The global period panties market was valued at USD 156.27 million in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 577.89 million by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 15.64% during the forecast period. Period panties are designed to offer leak-proof protection during menstruation, with multiple absorbent layers and moisture-wicking fabrics. Options include reusable and disposable variants in different styles and sizes. The market is driven by increasing awareness of sustainable menstrual products, with initiatives like the Más Madrid Alcobendas' 2025 program aiming to combat period poverty through reusable product distribution. Brands like Thinx and Modibodi are partnering with NGOs and using social media to normalize discussions on menstrual health. Companies continue to innovate in leak-proof technologies and expand product ranges to meet consumer needs.

news.headline: Sidetrade achieves Platinum from EthiFinance, Silver from EcoVadis for 2024, highlighting commitment to sustainability.
news.summary: In 2024, Sidetrade, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven Order-to-Cash solutions, has achieved notable recognition in the realm of corporate sustainability. The company received a Platinum medal from EthiFinance and a Silver medal from EcoVadis, showcasing its dedication to responsible practices and innovative approaches. This recognition highlights Sidetrade's commitment to sustainability and sets a high standard in the industry.

news.headline: Ollie's Bargain Outlet reports Q4 earnings, with $1.19/share and $667.1 million sales. Comparable store sales up 2.8%.
news.summary: Ollie's Bargain Outlet Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:OLLI) announced its fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday, reporting adjusted earnings per share of $1.19, meeting analyst expectations. The quarterly sales stood at $667.1 million, a 2.8% increase from the previous year, although falling short of the estimated $674.5 million. Comparable store sales saw a 2.8% rise compared to the previous year's 3.9% increase. Eric van der Valk, the President and CEO, highlighted the opportunities in the market due to numerous retail closures. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Currax receives FDA approval for second manufacturing site, ensuring consistent supply of CONTRAVE®/MYSIMBA. #1 oral weight loss medication.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Brentwood, Tennessee, Currax Pharmaceuticals LLC revealed they are the makers of the leading branded oral weight loss medication CONTRAVE® (naltrexone HCl/bupropion HCl). The U.S. Food & Drug Administration (FDA) has approved their product.

news.headline: SafeRide Health wins 2025 USA TODAY Top Workplaces Award for valuing employees; recognized as a leading NEMT company.
news.summary: A prestigious national award was recently given to SafeRide Health, a top non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) company in the United States, for its commitment to valuing and enhancing its employees' talents. The award-winning company, based in San Antonio, was honored on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Exceptional Smiles at Landerbrook in Mayfield, OH, named a top patient-rated dentist for 2025 at 5825 Landerbrook Drive.
news.summary: Located at 5825 Landerbrook Drive, Suite #121 in Mayfield Heights, Ohio, Exceptional Smiles at Landerbrook offers a wide variety of advanced dental services designed to meet the specific requirements of every individual. The facility aims to provide top-notch dental care to patients. This news comes from Mayfield Heights, Ohio, and was released on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Three UBS advisors in Arizona, Susan Bailey, Jennifer Lucovich, and Jennifer Pope, recognized in Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-In-State list for 2025.
news.summary: In Phoenix, three UBS Scottsdale Financial Advisors, Susan Bailey, Jennifer Lucovich, and Jennifer Pope, have been recognized on the Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-In-State 2025 list. This prestigious accolade highlights their exceptional performance in the field of wealth management.

news.headline: Z SUPPLY launches second exclusive collection with Diamond Cross Ranch, known for comfort and style.
news.summary: A women's fashion brand based in Costa Mesa, California, Z SUPPLY, is set to launch its second collaboration with the renowned Diamond Cross Ranch. The brand, recognized for its focus on comfort and effortless style in everyday essentials, announced the collaboration on March 20, 2025. Diamond Cross Ranch, which has been in operation since 1912, is known for its iconic status in the industry. This collaboration underscores Z SUPPLY's commitment to unique partnerships and its dedication to offering high-quality products.

news.headline: Formic partners with NAIA to boost U.S. manufacturing with increased automation, working with Palantir and Dirac.
news.summary: Formic has recently announced its decision to join the NAIA in Chicago as part of its efforts to support the revitalization of the U.S. manufacturing sector. The collaboration aims to promote accessible automation and drive innovation within the industry. This move underscores Formic's commitment to advancing manufacturing technologies and processes.

news.headline: S&T Bank wins 2025 USA Today Top Workplace award based on anonymous survey by Energage.
news.summary: S&T Bank, a subsidiary of S&T Bancorp Inc. (NASDAQ: STBA), located in Indiana, Pennsylvania, has been recognized as a 2025 USA Today Top Workplace. The award is a result of positive feedback from employees in a survey conducted by Energage. This accolade signifies the bank's commitment to providing a favorable work environment for its employees.

news.headline: New organization Grandmothers for Gun Responsibility launches to prevent gun violence, mobilizing trusted voices.
news.summary: A national organization called Grandmothers for Gun Responsibility, also known as The Grandmothers, was launched in Washington on March 20, 2025. The initiative aims to harness the influential voices of grandmothers and others who are troubled by gun violence. This organization seeks to unite people across generations to address this pressing issue.

news.headline: Medical Home Network appoints Dennis Payonk as Chief Product & Technology Officer to drive technology transformation for FQHCs.
news.summary: Dennis Payonk will lead the technology transformation efforts to enhance the success of value-based care within the safety net. The Medical Home Network, a platform that supports federally qualified health centers (FQHCs) across the country in achieving success in value-based care, has announced its expansion on March 20, 2025. This expansion aims to drive the adoption of technology solutions to further empower FQHCs in delivering effective healthcare services.

news.headline: Study: 1 in 5 adult eczema patients have multiple eczema conditions, according to research by the National Eczema Association.
news.summary: In a recent study published in the Journal of Investigative Dermatology, the National Eczema Association revealed significant findings. On March 20, 2025, in Novato, California, the NEA made public their research letter titled "Prevalence and Co-Occurrence of Eczema Types in the United States." This research sheds light on the frequency and simultaneous occurrence of different types of eczema across the nation. The study's insights are crucial, with implications for individuals suffering from eczema-related conditions. The NEA's latest findings provide valuable information to aid in understanding and addressing eczema, a condition affecting a substantial number of people in the U.S.

news.headline: A&D Mortgage introduces first integrated Non-QM AUS, pioneering innovation in mortgage industry.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, A&D Mortgage, the top Non-QM lender in the nation, has introduced a new automated decision system for Non-QM loan products.

news.headline: Carbon Arc secures $56M funding for world's first consumption-based insights exchange, fueling expansion with top investors.
news.summary: A technology company from New York, Carbon Arc, has secured $56 million in venture capital funding to introduce the globe's initial real-time insights exchange. This platform will offer businesses and the artificial intelligence sector with readily available intelligence and well-organized, model-prepared data. The primary investor is Liberty City Ventures, a company that has nurtured Carbon Arc from its inception. Other contributors include K5 Global, Raptor Group, and Wasserman Media Group. The substantial investment will enable Carbon Arc to expand its data utility services.

news.headline: QIMA partners with TA Associates, a private equity firm, for growth in the testing, inspection, and certification industry.
news.summary: A notable investment has been made in QIMA as TA Associates, a prominent global private equity firm, has decided to invest in the company. This investment signifies a significant milestone for QIMA, as it will provide them with the necessary resources and support to further expand their operations. The exact amount of the investment has not been disclosed, but it is expected to be a substantial sum that will aid in QIMA's growth and development in the foreseeable future.
